active_goal: Advance the Mac-local MLX inference stack only with changes that measurably improve retained prompt-processing or generation latency, preserve response quality, and do not increase runtime instability.

latest_commits.message: [#1190] refresh LM Studio VLM validation gate
[#1190] add LFM2.5 text cache compare gate
[#1190] add LFM2.5 text cache ratio report

recent_milestones.name: LFM2.5 text-cache gate
recent_milestones.summary: Added a non-prompting real-model pytest gate for LFM2.5-VL text-only generated-token cache reuse. Heavy validation reused 542/565 prompt tokens, processed 23 follow-up prefill tokens, and preserved Silas.

recent_milestones.name: LFM2.5 text-cache benchmark
recent_milestones.summary: Added scripts/lfm25_text_cache_bench.py and captured a two-sample retained baseline with row errors 0, follow-up cache reuse, small prefill, and name fidelity.

recent_milestones.name: LFM2.5 text-cache ratio reporting
recent_milestones.summary: Added normalized follow-up cache-reuse and prefill ratios. Three-sample retained baseline cache-reuse ratio avg 0.95929203539823; prefill ratio avg 0.04070796460176991; row errors 0.

recent_milestones.name: LFM2.5 text-cache comparison gate
recent_milestones.summary: Added scripts/lfm25_text_cache_compare.py to compare retained baseline/candidate text-cache reports without loading MLX. M53 vs M52 passed with zero cache-reuse and prefill-ratio regression.

recent_milestones.name: LM Studio VLM live-validation gate refresh
recent_milestones.summary: Read-only preflight remains blocked because retained LFM2.5-VL is not visible in lms ls --json. Supported lms get probe resolved the correct 2.09 GB artifact but timed out after about 300s at 0.0% progress.

blockers.description: Retained LFM2.5-VL model directory is complete and LM Studio model-data contains the model key, but lms ls --json does not expose the VLM. Live LM Studio validation must not run until preflight reports ready_for_live_validation=true.

hard_constraints: Do not remove restore-time mx.eval(...) as a shortcut.
Do not retry full-prefix KV span packing without a different write-amplification plan.
Do not promote a runtime candidate without repeated retained-workload benchmarks, passing quality gates, candidate-vs-baseline deltas, and live LM Studio validation.
Do not treat a copied LM Studio model directory or model-data entry as sufficient; lms ls --json must expose the retained VLM model key.
next_actions: If LM Studio model registration changes, rerun scripts/lmstudio_vlm_live_validation_preflight.py with a fresh output path.
If preflight reports ready_for_live_validation=true, proceed to backend registration and live /v1/chat/completions validation for the installed LM Studio runtime.

For any new text-cache runtime candidate, capture a retained candidate report with scripts/lfm25_text_cache_bench.py and compare it with scripts/lfm25_text_cache_compare.py before promotion discussion.
If no LM Studio progress is possible, continue only with isolated local hypotheses that preserve the no-promotion rule until live validation is available.

validation.command: python3 -m json.tool for M54 and M55 JSON artifacts
git diff --check before M54 and M55 commits
